message:
perf(evidence,plan,service,trace,channel): migrate remaining std Mutex sites to parking_lot Mutex

Completes the crate-wide parking_lot migration for the last five modules
that still used std::sync::Mutex:

evidence_sink.rs:
- JsonlSink and CollectorSink: std::sync::Mutex → parking_lot::Mutex
- JsonlSink::path() removes .map/.unwrap_or_default pattern, directly
  calls .lock().path().to_path_buf()
- JsonlSink::emit() removes if-let-Ok poison guard, directly locks
- CollectorSink::entries() and len() remove .map/.map_or poison patterns
- CollectorSink::emit() removes if-let-Ok guard

plan/fixtures.rs:
- SharedLabInner state: std::sync::Mutex → parking_lot::Mutex
- All 7 .lock().unwrap() calls in SharedLabHandle methods (join, poll,
  try_join_probe) and spawn_lab_race() replaced with direct .lock()

service/service.rs:
- AsupersyncAdapter (Tower integration): std::sync::Mutex → parking_lot::Mutex
- call() .lock().expect("lock poisoned") → .lock()

trace/crashpack.rs:
- MemoryCrashPackWriter: std::sync::Mutex → parking_lot::Mutex
- written(), count(), and write() all remove .expect("lock poisoned")

channel/watch.rs:
- Fixes 7 remaining test sites that still used .lock().unwrap() after
  the previous parking_lot migration. These were missed because the
  tests accessed internal fields directly rather than through the
  public API that was already migrated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
